subcodes.first_line: O cherished handmaid of the Most Glorious Beauty! Be thou neither sorrowful nor dismayed, neither sit thou grief-stricken. This fleeting world is not worthy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز عزیز جمال ابهی محزون مباش مغموم مگرد دلخون منشین اینجهان فانی لایق
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
